records.m_Talk_FRA: Far superior to those knockoff Replacer ones floating around on the black market.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Minimal physical degradation, and maximum boost to Counter Reality Force potential.

records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as you can shoulder the risk, there are plenty of ways for the ordinary to become strong.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Otherwise, this world's just too unfair, wouldn't you agree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what do you say, Bristlegrass?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what do you say, Bristlegrass?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what do you say, Bristlegrass?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you and I go back, I could give you a few ampoules free of charge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you and I go back, I could give you a few ampoules free of charge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you and I go back, I could give you a few ampoules free of charge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, there's a risk. But if you want power fast, that's about the only way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just shut it and watch! Damn hag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just shut it and watch! Damn hag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just shut it and watch! Damn hag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, kid! This time, I'll show you what I'm made of!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, kid! This time, I'll show you what I'm made of!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, kid! This time, I'll show you what I'm made of!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, Laika!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, Laika!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, Laika!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, maybe even a weed can bloom into a flower after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, maybe even a weed can bloom into a flower after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, maybe even a weed can bloom into a flower after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's still a mouthy little thing, but there's something satisfying about her tenacity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's still a mouthy little thing, but there's something satisfying about her tenacity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's still a mouthy little thing, but there's something satisfying about her tenacity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there's joy in taming a flower no one else can. That's what makes a gardener's life worthwhile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there's joy in taming a flower no one else can. That's what makes a gardener's life worthwhile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there's joy in taming a flower no one else can. That's what makes a gardener's life worthwhile.
